text.tspan: Chassis earth bus (GRN 14 AWG) - FILT PE, motor frame (BOND-001), bay panel
Panel Wiring - Zone 3 of 4: BLOWER BAY (DR-011)
FILT-001 mandatory: blocks TRIAC EMI from re-entering mains and SPI bus.
BOND-001 mandatory: universal motor frame must be earth-bonded.
FERR-001 ferrites snap on every motor lead and TC SPI cable.
Cable schedule (cables entering / leaving this zone)
